scripts.contract: npm run backend:openapi && npm run frontend:contract
scripts.typecheck: npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run backend:typecheck
scripts.test: npm run frontend:test && npm run backend:test
scripts.build: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build
scripts.audit: npm run frontend:audit && npm run backend:audit
scripts.validate: npm run contract && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run audit
